mapper.select: SELECT user_seq AS userSeq, user_id AS userId, password_hash AS passwordHash, email AS email, role_code AS roleCode, otp_enabled AS otpEnabled, account_status AS accountStatus, failed_login_count AS failedLoginCount, locked_until AS lockedUntil, last_login_at AS lastLoginAt FROM app_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT user_seq AS userSeq, user_id AS userId, email AS email, role_code AS roleCode, otp_enabled AS otpEnabled, account_status AS accountStatus, failed_login_count AS failedLoginCount, locked_until AS lockedUntil, last_login_at AS lastLoginAt FROM app_user WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq}
mapper.update: UPDATE app_user SET failed_login_count = 0, account_status = 'ACTIVE', locked_until = NULL WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq}
UPDATE app_user SET failed_login_count = 0, account_status = 'ACTIVE', locked_until = NULL WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO otp_code (user_seq, code_hash, expires_at) VALUES (#{userSeq}, #{codeHash}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT otp_id AS otpId, user_seq AS userSeq, code_hash AS codeHash, attempt_count AS attemptCount, expires_at AS expiresAt FROM otp_code WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} AND used_yn = 'N' AND expires_at > #{now} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refresh_token (user_seq, token_hash, expires_at, issued_ip, user_agent) VALUES (#{userSeq}, #{tokenHash}, #{expiresAt}, #{issuedIp}, #{userAgent})
mapper.select: SELECT token_id AS tokenId, user_seq AS userSeq, token_hash AS tokenHash, expires_at AS expiresAt, revoked_at AS revokedAt FROM refresh_token WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND revoked_at IS NULL
